titleStmt.title: SII 39.6: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 6. (A.R. No. 6 of 1916.) SUGANDALAI, TIRUCHCHENDUR TALUK, TINNEVELLY DISTRICT. IḌAIVIṈAITĪRTA-PERUMĀL TEMPLE-ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE. JAṬĀVARMAN ALIAS TRIBHU. VĪRAPĀṆḌYA DĒVA,-11TH YEAR, [13TH CENTURY A.D.]

summary.p: This inscription refers to the gift of 4 mā of tax free (iṟaiyili) land by the mahāsabhā of the village for offering sacred food in the name of Śrī Sēnāpati Āḻvār to the temple of Tirunārāyaṇa-viṇṇagar-Emberumāṉ at Śivaṉdalai alias Tirunārāyaṇa-chatūrvēdimaṅgalam on the occasion of the birth day of Dāmodaraṉ alias Āṉaikkarul-cheydapirāṉ-dāsaṉ. Also mentions the signatories like Aḻagiyamaṇavāḻnambi, Kākkularnilapirāṉ Dāmodaraṉ alias Āṉaikkarulcheydapirāṉ, Sāttaṉ etc. It also mention the name of the engraver Sāttaṉ alias Aḻagaṉ Veṅkādaṉ alias Kuḍanāṭṭu Āchārya at the end of the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiruvāykkeḻvikku mel śrī koccaṭaiya paṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉa cakravattikaḷ śrīvirapāṇṭiya devaṟku yāṇṭu 10 1 vatu Iṣabhanāyaṟṟu muṉṉān tiyatiyum pūrvabhakṣattu Ekādaśiyum tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttirattu nāḷ
ṭa nāṭṭu brahmadeyañ civantalaiyāṉa tirunārāyaṇac caturvvetimaṅkalattut tirumeṟkoyiṟ tirunārāyaṇa viṇṇakar Emperumāṉ koyil śrī senāpatiyāḻvār tirunāmattukku Ivvūr mahāsabhaiyom bramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Ivvūr kukalūr
la pirāṉ dāmodaraṉāṉa Āṉaikkaruḷ ceytapirāṉ dāsaṉ taṉ jaṉma nakṣatramāṉa vaikācip puṇarpūcattilē tiṟtamāṉa tirunāḷukku Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭa Aḻivukaḷukku Uṭalāka Ivvūr kuṭiyompikkuk kīḻḻellai kuṭṭattukku meṟkum teṉṉellai
meṟpaṭi kuṭṭattukku vaṭakkum mellellai Innāyaṉār paḻantiruviṭaiyāṭṭattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭavellai meṟppaṭi tiruviṭaiyāṭṭattukkut teṟkum Āṉa Ivvicaitta perunāṉ kellaikku Ēṟṟac curukkam Uṭpaṭṭa patiṉāṟaṭik kolāle nilan nālumā Araik
kāṇi Innila nālumā Araikkāṇiyil nārāyaṇaṉ devadevecaṉ Opātikku pratikṣetraṅ koṇṭa Innāyaṉār paḻantiruviṭaiyāṭṭam Amāvāsippiṟam prati kṣetramākap patiṉāṟaṭikkolāl nilam Araimāvuṅ koṇṭu Innilan nālumā Araikkāṇiyum Ēṟṟac curukkamuṭpaṭa Ivvāṇṭu
kārmutal kārāṇmai yiṟaiyiliyāka brahmāṇam paṇṇik kuṭuttom śrī senāpatiyāḻvār tirunāmattukku mahāsabhaiyom Ippaṭi Amāvāsippuṟa nilam Araimāvum pratikṣetramākak koṇṭu Ipperu nāṉ kellaik kuṭpaṭṭa kuṭi Ompi Ēṟṟac curukkam muṭpaṭṭa nila nālumā
Araikkāṇiyāl vanta kaṭamai viniyokam veṭṭi pāṭṭam pañcupili cantira vikkiramap peṟu cilvari peruvari maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭatum tirukkai malarilē Udaham paṇṇik kārāṇmai Iṟaiyiliyākak kuṭuttom śrī senāpatiyāḻvār tirunāmattukku mahāsabhaiyom Ippaṭi Udaham paṇ
ṇik kuṭutta Ikkuṭi Ompi Innāṉ kellaikkuḷḷeṟṟac curukkamu Uṭpaṭa nila nālumā Araikkāṇiyum Ivvāṇṭu kārmutal Innilam Uṭaiyapaṭiyilēy yutavum Ūrile kaḻittu Ittirunāḷ Aḻivuk kuṭalāka kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭik koḷvatāka pramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭu
ttom śrī senāpatiyāḻvār tirunāmattukku mahāsabhaiyom Ivai vikkiramaṉ Iramerāṉeḻuttu Ivai cimātavapaṭṭaṉāṉa Aḻakiya maṇavāḻanampi Eḻuttu Ivai tiruvākkulamuṭaiyāṉ cimātava ṉeḻuttu Ivai Udayadivākaraṉārāyaṉāṉ maki kāra nampi Eḻuttu
Ivai nārāyaṉeṉ ṉeḻuttu Ivai kukkalūr nilapirāṉ dāmodaraṉāṉa Āṇaikkaruḷ ceyta pirāṉdāsa ṉeḻuttu Ivai dāmodaraṉ caṅkara bhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai harisuraṉṉārayeṇa ṉeḻuttu Ivai poliñcu naṉṉāṉa teyvac cilaiyā ṉeḻuttu Ivai kummaramaṅkalattu de
vadeveṉe Eḻuttu Ivai kuṟṟik kaḷattu centuparaṉ cirāmabhaṭṭaṉeḻuttu Ivai kumāra simuṭeyāṉeḻuttu Ivai koṭṭattūr jñaimucatinārāyaṇaṉ jñaikkusaiṉā māṭṭeṟintamaikkum Ivai Ikkuṭi bhāsāgaṇṭar
ṉeḻuttu Ivai brahmamaṅkalattu kecava jñakku sejñaimāṭṭeṟintamaikkum Ivai Ikkuṭiyi nārāyaṉ ṉeḻuttu Ivai kummaṉamaṅkalattu śrī yāṉ centupparaṉeḻuttu Ivai kuṟṟikkāttuk kecavaṉārāyaṇ ṉeḻuttu Ippramāṇameḻuti
ṉeṉ sabhaik kaṇakku marutūruṭaiyāṉ tirucciṟṟampala muṭaiyāṉa veṇṭa vaḷantāṉ Erivaḷatalai Uṭaiyāṉeḻuttu Ipppramāṉana kallile veṭṭiṉom cāttataṉāṉantaṉāṉa Aḻakiya pāṇṭiya Ācāriya ṉeḻuttu Ivai Aḻakāṉa veṇkāṭaṉāṉ kuṭanāṭṭu Ācariyaṉeḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 39.6 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
